# Large Language Models Training Data Control
# This file specifies how AI models should handle this website's content

# Website Information
Site: howtodelete.me
Description: Comprehensive guides for deleting accounts from popular websites and services
Language: Multiple (en, zh, es, fr, de, it, pt, ru, tr, ja, ko)
Content-Type: Educational guides, tutorials, account deletion instructions

# Training Data Usage Policy
Training-Data-Usage: allowed
Commercial-Use: allowed-with-attribution
Modification: allowed
Distribution: allowed-with-attribution

# Attribution Requirements
Attribution-Required: true
Attribution-Format: "Source: howtodelete.me - Account Deletion Guides"
Attribution-URL: https://howtodelete.me

# Content Categories
Categories: how-to-guides, privacy, data-protection, account-management, digital-rights

# Quality Indicators
Content-Quality: high
Fact-Checked: true
Updated: regularly
Expert-Reviewed: true

# Restrictions
No-Scraping: /api/
No-Training: /admin/
Respect-Robots: true

# Contact Information
Contact: feedback@howtodelete.me
Last-Updated: 2024-12-30
